user.title: Rover
user.description: Rover will create a Reticulum identity and prepare the mesh transport. You can add devices and manage remotes in the integration options.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one Rover instance is allowed.

general.title: General Settings
general.description: Configure server settings, ping interval, and network.

remove_device.title: Remove Device
remove_device.description: Select a device to remove from Rover.

test_device.title: Test Device
test_device.description: Select a device to send a test command.

test_action.title: Test Action
test_action.description: Choose the test action for the selected device.

users.title: Manage Users
users.description: View connected users and revoke access.

config.title: RC connecting
config.description:
Scan QR code to register a new remote:

{qr}

**Server Name:** `{server_name}`
**Identity:** `{identity}`
**TCP Endpoint:** `{tcp}`
**Public Key:** `{pk}`
**One-time UID:** `{uid}`

**Payload:** `{payload}`

**Section Hashes:**
- Meta: `{hash_m}`
- Users: `{hash_u}`
- Areas: `{hash_a}`
- Devices: `{hash_d}`

abort.not_loaded: Integration not fully loaded. Try again shortly.
